hooks.command: if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE 'src/security/|src/mcp-proxy/'; then npx vitest run tests/sanitizer.test.ts tests/injection-patterns.test.ts tests/path-guard.test.ts tests/allowlist.test.ts --reporter=verbose 2>&1; fi
if echo "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" | grep -qE '\.ts$'; then npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | head -20; fi
